Off Calendar Mar-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marcus D. Merchasin, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Setiana Santoso and Batavia Garden Indonesia Restaurant, Inc.
Robert T. Kawamoto, Esq., for Plaintiff and opposing party: Tasana Ongbhaibulya

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Setiana Santoso's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories is Granted. The Court exercises its discretion and will not consider plaintiff's late-filed memorandum. Plaintiff is ordered to serve supplemental verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that plaintiff failed to respond in a timely fashion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $790 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
